name: QuoteKG

formData.dct:title: QuoteKG
formData.dct:description: QuoteKG is a large-scale multilingual knowledge graph of quotations, designed to capture and link quotes from public figures across different languages, contexts, and sources. Formally defined as a DCAT dataset and VoID dataset (http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#Dataset, http://rdfs.org/ns/void#Dataset), QuoteKG represents the first structured effort to semantically model quotations at scale. Its schema conforms to the RDF syntax model (http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#).

dcat:distribution.title: QuoteKG dataset files
dcat:distribution.description: Access to QuoteKG datasets, SPARQL endpoint, and documentation

cito:citesAsAuthority: QuoteKG: A Multilingual Knowledge Graph of Quotes”(https://www.researchgate.net/publication/360958399_QuoteKG_A_Multilingual_Knowledge_Graph_of_Quotes), Presented at the International Semantic Web Conference, 2021.

void:sparqlEndpoint.dct:title: QuoteKG Query Service
void:sparqlEndpoint.dct:description: The QuoteKG SPARQL endpoint provides access to the complete multilingual quotations dataset, allowing users to query quotes, speakers, and alignments across languages and sources.

dcat:keyword: knowledge graph, quotes, cross-lingual alignment, open data, and text mining.
